news.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Launches $2.5 Billion Frontier Company For Enterprise AI Adoption
news.summary: Microsoft has announced the launch of Microsoft Frontier Company with a planned investment of $2.5b. The new unit will embed 6,000 AI engineers and specialists directly with enterprise customers. The initiative aims to accelerate large scale AI adoption across industries in partnership with firms such as Accenture and KPMG.
